test_cases.summary: Regression: Standard Cost Purchase Requisition - 137 PO Conversion

description.scenario: Verify that standard cost purchase requisitions (non-subcontracted) still flow correctly through BPMS015 and convert to a 137 series PO, ensuring the change did not break existing functionality.
description.expected_result: Standard cost PRQ approved and converted to 137 series PO successfully.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.

Maintain header with buyer and business agreement. Create a new requisition line with a standard cost item (ZZZCST), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, and valid pegging information (Project and Activity).
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions.
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved.
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next.
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next.
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining. Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted.
steps.expected_result: BWQ case completed. PRQ status is Converted.

steps.action: Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000). Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval.
steps.expected_result: 137 PO number displayed. PO submitted for approval.

steps.action: Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC.

test_cases.summary: Functional: Subcontracted Requisition Missing Peg/GI Information

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 auto-rejects a subcontracted purchase requisition if pegging and GI information fields are missing, as per the new validation requirement.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition auto-rejected by BPMS015 due to missing peg/GI info. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL.
Ensure pegging and GI information fields are blank or missing for the requisition line.
Submit PRQ for approval.
BPMS015 performs auto-rejection check. Verify requisition is auto-rejected due to missing Peg/GI information.
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to PEG/GI info missing.

test_cases.summary: Functional: Subcontracted Requisition Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects a subcontracted purchase requisition after buyer review if the Business Partner (BP) or Employee supplier fields are blank.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 after buyer review due to blank BP/Employee. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-ITEM.
Maintain header with buyer. Leave Business Partner (BP) and Employee supplier fields blank on the requisition line.
steps.expected_result: Requisition line created with blank BP/Employee.

steps.action: Submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: BPMS015 performs validation check on subcontracted items. Verify requisition is rejected due to blank BP or Employee supplier.
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to blank BP/Employee.

test_cases.summary: Functional: SubConDefault Items Not Linked to Production Orders

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects a subcontracted purchase requisition if the item is marked as SubConDefault but is not linked to an active production order.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 due to SubConDefault item not linked to production order. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create a production order in tisfc0501m000 with header details (warehouse, routing, dates) and add a line with project/activity.
Create purchase requisition with SubConDefault item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-DEFAULT.
Ensure the production order is NOT linked to this specific PRQ (do not generate subcontracting documents or link via Planning Line tab).
steps.expected_result: No link between PO and PRQ established.

steps.action: Submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: BPMS015 performs validation check. Verify requisition is rejected because SubConDefault item is not linked to a production order.
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to SubConDefault item not linked to production order.

test_cases.summary: Functional: Multi-line Requisition with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects a multi-line purchase requisition if it contains subcontracted items, regardless of other line validity.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 due to multi-line requisition containing subcontracted items. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create first line with a standard cost item (ZZZCST). Create second line with a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-ITEM).
Maintain header with buyer and business agreement. Submit PRQ for approval.
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email.
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next.
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval.

steps.action: BPMS015 performs validation check on multi-line requisitions. Verify requisition is rejected due to presence of subcontracted items in a multi-line setup.
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to multi-line requisition with subcontracted items.
